text:
0902 The Final Decision....alterna orchestra is a digital single by Shirō Sagisu. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-2105, it was released on 24 April 2019. https://vgmdb.net/album/86236 It is a promotional release https://www.eva-info.jp/5655 of the Evangelion Wind Symphony performances in early summer, 2019. https://www.eva-info.jp/5432

Track 01
Composition: Shirō Sagisu
Arrangements: Masamichi Amano
